description: Google Drive Sync — Automatic multi-device sync via Google Drive with additive merge, soft deletes, and OAuth sign-in

userStories.title: Add sync metadata fields to DiaryEntry model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LastModified and IsDeleted fields on DiaryEntry so the sync engine can resolve conflicts and propagate deletions.
acceptanceCriteria: DiaryEntry model has 'DateTime LastModified' property with default DateTime.UtcNow
DiaryEntry model has 'bool IsDeleted' property with default false
New SyncEnvelope model created in Models/SyncEnvelope.cs with Version (string, default '1'), LastSyncedUtc (DateTime), and Entries (List<DiaryEntry>)
Existing app behavior is unchanged — no compile errors from new fields
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update DiaryService for soft deletes and change tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the diary service to use soft deletes, track modification times, and fire change events so the sync engine can operate correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: IDiaryService interface adds: GetAllIncludingDeletedAsync(), ReplaceAllAsync(List<DiaryEntry>), and event Action? OnDataChanged
GetAllAsync() filters out entries where IsDeleted == true
GetAllAsync() on first call backfills LastModified from Timestamp.ToUniversalTime() for entries where LastModified == default(DateTime) (migration of pre-existing data)
AddAsync() sets LastModified = DateTime.UtcNow before saving and fires OnDataChanged
UpdateAsync() sets LastModified = DateTime.UtcNow before saving and fires OnDataChanged
DeleteAsync() sets IsDeleted = true and LastModified = DateTime.UtcNow instead of removing the entry, and fires OnDataChanged
GetAllIncludingDeletedAsync() returns all entries without filtering
ReplaceAllAsync() overwrites the full LocalStorage 'diary-entries' key
Existing UI pages still work correctly — soft-deleted entries are invisible
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Google Auth JavaScript interop module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a JavaScript module that handles Google Identity Services OAuth so Blazor can authenticate users for Drive access.
acceptanceCriteria: File wwwroot/js/google-auth.js created
JS module dynamically loads Google Identity Services library from accounts.google.com/gsi/client
Exposes window.googleAuth.initialize(clientId) that creates a TokenClient with scope 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.appdata'
Exposes window.googleAuth.signIn() that returns a Promise resolving to an access token string
Exposes window.googleAuth.signOut() that revokes the token
Exposes window.googleAuth.getAccessToken() that returns the current token or null
Exposes window.googleAuth.isSignedIn() that returns a boolean
Access token is stored in JS module-scoped variable only, not in localStorage
Client ID 101133685796-p43f4uqejgt9lgce4lvibrnoam8oegb1.apps.googleusercontent.com is used
Script tag added to wwwroot/index.html: <script src='js/google-auth.js'></script>
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: C# Google Auth service wrapping JS interop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a C# service that wraps the Google Auth JS module so other services can authenticate without touching JavaScript directly.
acceptanceCriteria: IGoogleAuthService interface created in Services/ with methods: InitializeAsync(), SignInAsync() returning Task<string?>, SignOutAsync(), IsSignedInAsync() returning Task<bool>, GetAccessTokenAsync() returning Task<string?>
GoogleAuthService implementation uses IJSRuntime to call the JS google-auth module functions
InitializeAsync() calls window.googleAuth.initialize with the hardcoded client ID
Service registered as scoped in Program.cs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Google Drive API service for sync file operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service that reads and writes the sync JSON file to Google Drive's appDataFolder.
acceptanceCriteria: IGoogleDriveService interface created with: FindSyncFileAsync() returning (string? fileId, string? version), DownloadSyncFileAsync(string fileId) returning SyncEnvelope?, UploadSyncFileAsync(SyncEnvelope envelope, string? existingFileId, string? version) returning (string fileId, string version)
GoogleDriveService uses HttpClient with Bearer token from IGoogleAuthService
FindSyncFileAsync queries GET /drive/v3/files?spaces=appDataFolder&q=name='turdtracker-sync.json'&fields=files(id,version)
DownloadSyncFileAsync calls GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}?alt=media and deserializes JSON to SyncEnvelope
UploadSyncFileAsync creates new file (multipart POST to /upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart with parents=['appDataFolder']) or updates existing (PATCH) with If-Match header for concurrency
Service registered as scoped in Program.cs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Merge engine with additive merge and conflict resolution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a merge engine that combines local and remote entry lists additively, resolving conflicts by latest timestamp.
acceptanceCriteria: Static MergeEngine class (or static method on SyncService) with method: Merge(List<DiaryEntry> local, List<DiaryEntry> remote) returning MergeResult
MergeResult contains: List<DiaryEntry> MergedEntries, bool LocalChanged, bool RemoteChanged
Entries only in local set are kept in merged result
Entries only in remote set are kept in merged result
Entries in both sets: the one with later LastModified (UTC) wins
Soft-deleted entries (IsDeleted=true) are included in merged result
Tombstones older than 90 days (IsDeleted=true and LastModified < 90 days ago) are purged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sync orchestrator service with auto-sync and debounce
userStories.description: As a user, I want my diary to sync automatically when I make changes and when the app starts, so all my devices stay up to date.
acceptanceCriteria: ISyncService interface with: SyncAsync(), SyncStatus property (enum: NotSignedIn, Idle, Syncing, Synced, Error), LastSyncedUtc property, event Action? OnSyncStatusChanged, InitializeAsync()
SyncService implementation orchestrates: check auth -> download remote -> merge -> save local if changed -> upload if changed
On 412 Precondition Failed from upload, re-downloads, re-merges, and retries up to 3 times
Subscribes to DiaryService.OnDataChanged and triggers SyncAsync with 2-second debounce via CancellationTokenSource
InitializeAsync triggers sync on app startup if user is signed in
Sync skips silently when offline (catch HttpRequestException or check navigator.onLine)
If Drive API returns 401, attempts silent re-auth via GoogleAuthService.SignInAsync before setting Error status
SyncStatus and LastSyncedUtc update correctly and fire OnSyncStatusChanged on every transition
Service registered as scoped in Program.cs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sync status indicator icon in app bar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current sync status at a glance in the app bar so I know whether my data is up to date.
acceptanceCriteria: Sync icon button added to MainLayout.razor app bar between MudSpacer and theme toggle button
Synced state shows green CloudDone icon
Syncing state shows CloudSync icon (optionally with CSS rotation animation)
Error state shows red CloudOff icon; clicking shows a MudSnackbar with error details
NotSignedIn state shows grey CloudOff icon
Hovering or tapping the sync icon shows a MudTooltip with the last synced timestamp (or 'Not synced' if never)
Icon updates reactively when SyncService.OnSyncStatusChanged fires (calls StateHasChanged)
On firstRender in MainLayout, calls SyncService.InitializeAsync() to trigger startup sync
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Google Drive sync section on Settings page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my Google Drive connection from Settings so I can sign in, see sync status, manually sync, and sign out.
acceptanceCriteria: New 'Google Drive Sync' MudPaper section on Settings page between Appearance and Data sections
When not signed in: shows 'Sign in with Google' MudButton with Google icon
Clicking sign-in initiates GoogleAuthService.SignInAsync() then triggers SyncService.SyncAsync()
When signed in: shows sync status text, last sync time, 'Sync Now' MudButton, and 'Sign Out' MudButton
Sync Now button triggers SyncService.SyncAsync() and shows syncing state
Sign Out button calls GoogleAuthService.SignOutAsync() and updates UI to signed-out state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: First-visit sync onboarding banner on Home page
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to be prompted to connect Google Drive on my first visit so I discover the sync feature early.
acceptanceCriteria: On first app load (no prior sign-in and no dismiss flag), a MudAlert banner appears at the top of the Home page
Banner text explains the benefit of syncing (e.g., 'Sync your diary across devices with Google Drive')
Banner has a 'Connect Google Drive' action button that initiates sign-in flow
Banner has a dismiss/close option
Dismissing saves a flag to LocalStorage (e.g., 'sync-banner-dismissed') so it does not reappear
Banner does not appear if user is already signed in
Banner does not block any app functionality
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
